title: rosa lutetiana var. sphaerica
intro: Rosa lutetiana var. sphaerica, also known as the 'Blush Noisette' or 'Rose of Paris', is a fragrant and compact rose variety native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rosa lutetiana var. sphaerica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Rosa lutetiana var. sphaerica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
